data.title: Walmart and others lose Cyber 5 traffic share
data.description: Many of the largest retailers in the Top 1000 saw traffic shares shrink over the Cyber 5 as shoppers look elsewhere for deals.

data.title: Can Donald Trump, Jr. make an ecommerce company great again?
data.description: PublicSquare, which is matter of fact about running an ecommerce company that “supports traditional American values, conservatism, and the pro-life movement” has named Donald J. Trump, Jr., to its board of directors.

data.title: Alibaba rolls out another AI tool for marketplace sellers
data.description: Pic Copilot offers 12 AI tools that simplify tasks such as swapping image backgrounds, enhancing photos and videos, enabling virtual try-ons, and generating ad visuals.

data.title: Alibaba roles out another AI tool for marketplace sellers
data.description: Pic Copilot offers 12 AI tools that simplify tasks such as swapping image backgrounds, enhancing photos and videos, enabling virtual try-ons, and generating ad visuals.

data.title: Insider secures $500 million investment to expand B2B and B2C AI marketing applications
data.description: With a fresh $500 million investment from General Atlantic, Insider plans to boost its brand awareness and enhance its operations globally.
